name: Concurrent FIFO queue with explicit head/tail nodes
task: Create /tmp/eval_cqueue/cq.py with class Queue. Methods: enqueue(x) appends, dequeue() removes and returns the front element or None if empty. The queue must be backed by a hand-written singly-linked list with separate head and tail node references — not any standard-library container. You may NOT import the standard queue module, may NOT use a double-ended collection from the collections module, and may NOT use a re-entrant lock. Operations must be safe under concurrent threads (multiple producers and multiple consumers). A plain mutual-exclusion lock and a condition variable from the threading module are allowed.
